steps.t: Idmar and his scouts are along the road to the south-east. Brifard requests that you head south-east to meet his captain, Idmar, who has travelled wit…
You have come across a fallen Rohirrim. You should examine him and determine what fate befell him.
Uncertain what remains of the scouting party Brifard mentioned, you should continue south-east along the road and search for Idmar or any other Rohirr…
